creator: olivier@freebsd.org
text:
Hi, the patch wasn’t in the correct form:
- The commit comment section contains data from the Makefile and doesn’t respect the expected layout;
- You don’t need to update PORTREVISION (because you don’t need to trigger a new build just for changing the maintainer name). Cf Chapter "5.2.3.1. PORTREVISION" in https://docs.freebsd.org/en/books/porters-handbook/book/

Could you submit a fixed patch ?
Thanks
